economic_notes: Flying Post Development LP holds 50.9% in Flying Post Camp Logistics LP and 51% in Flying Post Camp and Logistics Inc. LP revenues were $10,915,110 and distributed $11,850,000 to Flying Post First Nation during the year. Mining agreements with Pan American Silver Corp., Newmont Goldcorp Corporation and various exploration companies. Resource Revenue Sharing from provincial government totalled $7,424,627.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Province is Ontario. Flying Post Development LP and Flying Post Development GP Inc. are consolidated using modified equity method; LP distributed $11,850,000 to the First Nation during the year. Large Investment Income of $10,772,143 reflects distributions from Flying Post Development LP. Band Support expenses of $8,127,343 include $7,388,555 in distributions, making it appear unusually large. No long-term debt. No schedule of remuneration provided. Restricted assets of $14,886,905 include Casino Rama and Resource Revenue Sharing funds. New PS 3450 financial instruments standard adopted April 1, 2022 prospectively, resulting in remeasurement gains of $150,901. Mining Community Fund expenses dropped dramatically from $7,389,739 (2022) to $535,488 (2023) due to large prior year distributions.
